use_cases: Form submission buttons with multiple visual variants
Icon-only buttons for toolbars and action bars
Secondary and ghost buttons for secondary actions
Accessible button implementation with Radix UI
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot for polymorphic rendering and class-variance-authority for variant management. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) with full TypeScript support and accessibility features including focus-visible ring styling and disabled state handling.
